kind_source: monitoring/daily_schedule.py slot (8, 3) -> ("PILOT_SAMPLE", "MSFT"). The scheduler start ACK logs/scheduler/pilot-20260721-0803.start.json carries only run_id/scheduled_for/status and no kind field, so the schedule table was consulted rather than inferring the kind from the run-id prefix. This matches the prompt's stated fallback research symbol (MSFT), an independent corroboration of the slot resolution. Same resolution method as pilot-20260721-0723 and -0743.

preflight.unfinished_trajectories_note: logs/quote_trajectories/2026-07-21/ exists but is empty. Runs pilot-20260721-0703, -0723 and -0743 each wrote zero events (no contract ever reached selection), so no trajectory was open or unfinished. Step 1 is vacuously satisfied and no refresh MCP calls were made.

upstream_gate.market_gate_detail: 4 PASS / 1 FAIL (immutable raw MCP snapshot) / 1 UNKNOWN (deterministic replay equality)
upstream_gate.effect_on_this_run: Formal Shadow remains unauthorized. This PILOT_SAMPLE run is research-only and excluded from performance, so it proceeded; no Shadow evidence was produced.

market_data.bar_timestamp_alignment: All 10 symbols returned exactly 96 bars with an identical newest begins_at (14:55:00Z); no gaps, duplicates, out-of-order bars, or interpolated bars detected.
market_data.lookback_exemption_note: The 420-second limit was applied only to the newest completed bar (begins 14:55:00Z / ends 15:00:00Z), measured from its end against the historicals receipt time. Older lookback bars were used at their recorded timestamps with no freshness rule applied. No ten-second rule was applied to any bar; the ten-second contract_eligibility quote-age rule governs option quotes at contract selection, which this run never reached.

evaluation.computation_note: Indicators were computed by the same deterministic local script authored for pilot-20260721-0723, reused byte-for-byte without modification so all four of today's PILOT_SAMPLE runs share identical logic. The runner only redirects stdout to this run's artifact path and performs no network access. The runner's first invocation raised KeyError on a trailing diagnostic print ('bar_count', a field the compute script does not emit) that was added by this run and is not part of the reused logic; the indicator JSON had already been written before that line, the offending line was removed, and the runner was re-executed to a clean exit 0 from the identical saved payload. No indicator value was affected, estimated, or hand-derived.
evaluation.ema_seeding: 20-bar simple average seed, then standard 2/(n+1) smoothing

market_regime.change_note: pilot-20260721-0743 also resolved DIRECTIONAL_UP. Both reference symbols continue to hold EMA alignment and close-above-VWAP across the two confirmation bars; the regime gate has now been non-binding for two consecutive slots.
market_regime.reason: require_price_vs_vwap_alignment = true with confirmation_completed_bars = 2 demands that BOTH reference symbols hold EMA alignment and close-above-VWAP across the last two completed bars. SPY and QQQ both qualified, so the regime resolves DIRECTIONAL_UP rather than falling to mixed_or_unknown_means_no_trade.

evaluation.volume_gate_note: No symbol reached even the strategy_v1.0.toml floor of 1.50; the highest observed ratio was TSLA at 0.6790. The BASE_25 and BASE_30 label thresholds are strictly higher still. With the regime gate passing again, volume remains the sole binding constraint. Ratios have fallen further this slot: the session-high ratio was 1.3144 at 07:43 and is 0.6790 now, roughly halving.
evaluation.breakout_note: No symbol printed breakout_up = true against its prior 6-bar high this slot (at 07:43 exactly one symbol, AMZN, did). Breakout and volume therefore both fail universe-wide; no symbol satisfied breakout, EMA alignment, and volume together.

BASE_25.reason: VOLUME_CONFIRMATION_FAILED for all 10 symbols (max ratio 0.6790 vs required 2.5), and BREAKOUT_NOT_CONFIRMED for all 10. Market regime PASSED this slot, so volume and breakout were the failing gates.

BASE_30.reason: VOLUME_CONFIRMATION_FAILED for all 10 symbols (max ratio 0.6790 vs required 3.0), and BREAKOUT_NOT_CONFIRMED for all 10. Market regime PASSED this slot, so volume and breakout were the failing gates.

AI_RANK_V1.reason: Zero deterministically qualified candidates. AI may rank or abstain only; with an empty qualified set the only permitted action is ABSTAIN. AI did not override, relax, or reorder any deterministic gate, and did not lower the volume threshold despite the regime gate having cleared.

candidates.note: Highest volume ratio of the slot with a full regime-quality trend profile, but no breakout against the prior 6-bar high. TSLA has now led or co-led the near-miss set at 07:23 (1.24), 07:43 (0.91) and 08:03 (0.68) — its volume ratio is monotonically decaying across the session, not building. Research observation only.

Second-highest ratio, but weaker than TSLA on quality: it holds EMA alignment and close-above-VWAP on the newest bar yet fails the two-bar confirmation. Recorded as the second near-miss because it ranks second on volume ratio, not because it is a better setup. Research observation only.

NEAR_MISS.reason: Two highest volume ratios recorded as near-miss research observations. Neither reached contract selection: both failed the volume gate by a wide margin (0.68 and 0.54 against a 2.5 floor) and neither confirmed a breakout, so no contract was deterministically defined. No option chain was queried and no contract was chosen, because selecting one would require inventing a selection the gates never produced.

policy_trade.note: Runs pilot-20260721-0703, -0723, -0743 and this run all produced NO_TRADE and consumed zero candidates, so the one-per-day policy-trade budget remains unused and available to the six remaining PILOT_SAMPLE slots today (08:23 through 11:23).

option_quote_refresh.reason: No contract was selected under any label, so there was no instrument to refresh. Zero option MCP calls were made.

simulated_fills.reason: No candidate reached contract selection; no fill, spread, latency, or friction figures are applicable. No mark fill was assumed anywhere.

trajectories.reason: config/quote_trajectory.schema.json requires instrument_id, option_type, strike and expiration_date on every event. With no selected contract these fields have no observed values, and inventing them would fabricate data. Zero events were written rather than partial or synthetic ones.

mcp_tool_usage.attestation: Only enabled official read-only get_* tools were used. No review, place, replace, cancel, transfer, watchlist-mutation, or account-mutation tool was invoked. No account numbers, names, credentials, tokens, or personal data were read or stored; no account, portfolio, positions, orders, or tax-lot endpoint was touched by this run.

timing.log_budget_note: The eight-minute log-completion budget was exceeded by roughly 146 seconds. The overrun is entirely post-MCP: run-kind resolution required reading the scheduler ACK, the launchd plists, the worker script and monitoring/daily_schedule.py because the ACK carries no kind field, and the indicator runner needed one corrective re-execution. All market data was captured at 97 seconds elapsed, so no observation was delayed or degraded by the overrun and no result depends on it. Reported rather than silently rounded down.

caveats: LOG BUDGET EXCEEDED: this run finished its logs at ~626s against a 480s budget. See timing.log_budget_note. No market observation was affected.

FREEZE CEREMONY INCOMPLETE: TODO.md:191 ('Freeze BASE_25, BASE_30, and AI_RANK_V1 before the next market sample') is still unchecked. Label semantics were taken from research/ACCELERATED_PROFITABILITY_AND_AI_EDGE_V1_CN.md (volume ratio >= 2.5 / >= 3.0) with all other parameters from strategy/strategy_v1.0.toml. These results are provisional until an owner performs the formal freeze; they must not be treated as frozen-label evidence.
strategy/strategy_v1.0.toml carries status = 'DESIGN', not an approved/frozen status.

VWAP is not supplied by the official MCP bar feed and is not pinned in strategy_v1.0.toml. Session VWAP was derived as volume-weighted typical price ((H+L+C)/3) over completed 2026-07-21 regular-hours bars, carried forward unchanged from pilot-20260721-0703 for consistency. This unpinned derivation drives the regime gate and should be pinned before any formal use.

The 20-bar volume average is a rolling window that crosses the session boundary: for the 14:55Z bar it spans today's bars plus a portion of yesterday's final bars. Mixing high-volume opening and closing bars into the denominator materially depresses mid-morning volume ratios. This follows the pinned volume_average_lookback_bars = 20 definition and was NOT altered, but the session-boundary behaviour deserves owner review.

ESCALATING: four consecutive PILOT_SAMPLE slots have now produced NO_TRADE with every symbol below even the 1.5 strategy floor, and the session-high volume ratio has fallen 1.31 -> 0.68 across the last two slots while the underlying tape trended up. A volume-ratio definition whose readings decay as the session matures is behaving like a session-boundary artifact rather than a market signal. This is now the single highest-value thing for an owner to re-examine; on current trajectory the remaining six slots will also produce NO_TRADE and today will yield zero contract-level trajectory data.
This slot is additionally the first today with zero breakouts anywhere in the universe, so no symbol was close to qualifying on any axis.
EMA-20 seeds from a 20-bar simple average with 96 bars of history; warmup is adequate but the slow EMA remains approximate near the seed.

The upstream MARKET_GATE for today failed closed on the immutable raw MCP snapshot, so no run today has a verified immutable snapshot backing it. This PILOT_SAMPLE run therefore has no immutable-snapshot provenance for its inputs; the historicals payload lives only in the session tool-results cache, not in the raw vault.

The scheduler start ACK carries no run-kind field; the kind was resolved from monitoring/daily_schedule.py and corroborated by the prompt's fallback symbol. If that table and the scheduler ever disagree, this run's classification should be re-audited.

REPO PATH DRIFT: config/com.robinhood-ai-trader.shadow-worker.plist and the canary plist still carry ProgramArguments pointing at the pre-move path '/Users/ge/Documents/AI trading agent/robinhood-ai-trader/scripts/launchd_shadow_worker.py', which no longer exists. This run was invoked successfully, so the loaded launchd job in ~/Library/LaunchAgents evidently differs from the checked-in config; the two are out of sync and the checked-in plists would fail if reloaded as-is. Flagged for owner review, not modified by this read-only run.
